hero.subheadline: Your Friendly AI in Digital Wallet
hero.body: In Thailand where everything is fast and convenient, Digital Wallet launches Ask AI – the first smart AI that understands Thai language and culture 100%. Whether in Bangkok, Phuket, or Chiang Mai — get answers instantly.

features.title: What you get from Ask AI + Digital Wallet
card1_items: KYC with Thai ID card or Passport (for foreigners)
Takes less than 5 minutes in Digital Wallet App
New customers who complete KYC get 10,000 THB in Digital Wallet
card2_items: Ask in natural Thai e.g. "How much is my balance?" / "Help transfer money to mom"
AI responds in a friendly tone, like a Thai friend
Supports: PromptPay · Utility bills · Top-up · International transfers
card3_items: Certified by DCA and Digital Wallet
AI designed to respect Thai culture — polite, gentle, "mai pen rai"
Thailand is the first in ASEAN to bring AI to e-wallet
features.info_title: Why do Thais love Digital Wallet?
info_items: Thailand ranks Top 5 globally in QR Code usage
Every 7-Eleven can top up Digital Wallet with cash
"Sabai sabai" culture fits perfectly with AI like Ask AI

how.title: How to make Ask AI your friend
how.step1_detail: App Store / Play Store · Country code: +66
how.step2_detail: Upload ID card or Passport · Verify with OTP (+66)
how.step3_detail: Tap the orange robot icon · Type or speak
how.step4_detail: Receive 10,000 THB · Use anywhere PromptPay / Digital Wallet is accepted
how.culture_note: Thailand = Land of Smiles — Ask AI robot is designed to smile and wink reflecting Thai hospitality

promo.headline: Get 10,000 THB in Digital Wallet
promo.subtext: For new customers who complete KYC successfully

chat.title_line1: I am DGA AI, your smart assistant
chat.description_line1: Ask me anything you want to know!
chat.description_line2: I summarize clearly, easy to understand, and reliable
chat.description_line3: Beta version - learning and improving for you
chat.input_placeholder: Ask what you want to know
